title: build: --source-date-epoch/--timestamp use static hostname/cid
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

When using either `--source-date-epoch` or `--timestamp`, make sure that handling of RUN instructions uses a defined hostname if possible, and commits using a reference to a static container name.

#### How to verify it

New integration test!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
`buildah build` sets a fixed hostname for RUN instructions when invoked with `--timestamp` or `--source-date-epoch`.
When building or committing images with the `--timestamp` or `--source-date-epoch` flags, the hostname, domain name, and name-of-container-which-was-committed will be set to fixed values.
```

comments.body: Wasn't testing the release note about RUN, added that.
